holdings.infoBox: BREW is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Coca-Cola Company stock at 19.49%, Starbucks at 19.06%, Westrock Coffee Company at 7.09%, BRC Inc. at 5.64%, and The J. M. Smucker Company at 5.57%.

overview.description: The Corgi Coffee & Energy Drinks ETF (BREW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies involved in the global coffee and energy drink ecosystem, including growers, beverage brands, cafes, ingredient suppliers, packaging providers, and distribution platforms. The fund aims for capital growth. BREW was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.

data.title: Corgi Funds Launches Record 34 ETFs
data.text: The U.S. ETF industry saw its single-largest new ETF rollout in history when issuer Corgi Funds launched 34 actively managed funds on the Cboe BZX exchange. The new products are a mix of thematic and ...
